sentences.target: On pique-nique sur la pelouse du parc.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ piknik syʁ la pəluz dy paʁk/

translations.fr: On pique-nique sur la pelouse du parc.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ piknik syʁ la pəluz dy paʁk/
translations.en: We’re picnicking on the park lawn.
translations.es: Estamos de picnic en el césped del parque.
translations.it: Stiamo facendo un picnic sul prato del parco.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在公园的草坪上野餐。
translations.yue: 我哋喺公園草地上野餐。
translations.ru: Мы устраиваем пикник на газоне в парке.
translations.pt: Estamos fazendo um piquenique no gramado do parque.
translations.he: אנחנו עושים פיקניק על הדשא בפארק.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang dã ngoại trên bãi cỏ trong công viên.
translations.ar: نحن نتناول طعام النزهة على عشب الحديقة.
translations.nl: We picknicken op het gras in het park.
translations.uk: Ми влаштовуємо пікнік на газоні в парку.
translations.hi: हम पार्क के लॉन पर पिकनिक मना रहे हैं।
translations.pl: Urządzamy piknik na trawniku w parku.
translations.el: Κάνουμε πικνίκ στο γρασίδι του πάρκου.
translations.nb: Vi har piknik på plenen i parken.
translations.id: Kami sedang berpiknik di rumput taman.
translations.sv: Vi har picknick på gräsmattan i parken.
translations.ro: Facem un picnic pe iarba din parc.
translations.da: Vi holder picnic på plænen i parken.
translations.ja: 私たちは公園の芝生でピクニックをしています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (3rd person singular form used for generic or colloquial ‘we’); grammatical subject of the verb.
Main verb (present indicative, 3rd person singular agreeing with ‘on’); denotes the action of having a picnic.
Preposition introducing a locative complement (‘sur la pelouse’); expresses position on top of.
Definite article (feminine singular) that determiners the noun ‘pelouse’.
Common noun (feminine singular); head of the noun phrase serving as the locative complement.
Contraction of ‘de + le’; preposition introducing the noun complement ‘parc’ (‘of the park’).
Common noun (masculine singular); object of the preposition ‘du’, specifying which lawn.

sentences.target: Je tonds la pelouse avant la pluie.
sentences.reading: /ʒə tɔ̃ la pəluz avɑ̃ la plɥi/

translations.fr: Je tonds la pelouse avant la pluie.
translations.ipa: /ʒə tɔ̃ la pəluz avɑ̃ la plɥi/
translations.en: I’m mowing the lawn before the rain.
translations.es: Estoy cortando el césped antes de que llueva.
translations.de: Ich mähe den Rasen, bevor es regnet.
translations.it: Sto tagliando il prato prima che piova.
translations.ko: 비 오기 전에 잔디를 깎고 있어요.
translations.pt: Estou cortando a grama antes da chuva.
translations.he: אני מכסח את הדשא לפני הגשם.
translations.vi: Tôi đang cắt cỏ trước khi mưa.
translations.ar: أنا أجزّ العشب قبل هطول المطر.
translations.nl: Ik maai het gras voordat het gaat regenen.
translations.hu: Lenyírom a füvet, mielőtt esni kezd.
translations.hi: मैं बारिश से पहले लॉन की घास काट रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Κουρεύω το γκαζόν πριν από τη βροχή.
translations.nb: Jeg klipper plenen før det begynner å regne.
translations.id: Saya sedang memotong rumput sebelum hujan.
translations.sv: Jag klipper gräsmattan innan det börjar regna.
translations.da: Jeg slår græsset, før det begynder at regne.
translations.fi: Leikkaan nurmikkoa ennen kuin alkaa sataa.
translations.ja: 雨が降る前に芝生を刈っています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (1st person singular); grammatical subject of the verb.
Main verb (present indicative, 1st person singular); transitive, taking ‘la pelouse’ as direct object.
Definite article (feminine singular) determiners the noun ‘pelouse’.
Common noun (feminine singular); direct object of the verb ‘tonds’.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement (‘avant la pluie’).
Definite article (feminine singular) determiners the noun ‘pluie’.
Common noun (feminine singular); object of the preposition ‘avant’.

sentences.target: Votre chien court sur la pelouse.

translations.fr: Votre chien court sur la pelouse.
translations.en: Your dog is running on the lawn.
translations.es: Su perro está corriendo por el césped.
translations.de: Ihr Hund läuft über den Rasen.
translations.it: Il suo cane sta correndo sul prato.
translations.pt: Seu cachorro está correndo no gramado.
translations.vi: Con chó của bạn đang chạy trên bãi cỏ.
translations.nl: Uw hond rent over het gras.
translations.hi: आपका कुत्ता लॉन पर दौड़ रहा है।
translations.el: Ο σκύλος σας τρέχει στο γρασίδι.
translations.id: Anjing Anda sedang berlari di rumput.
translations.ja: あなたの犬が芝生の上を走っています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person polite/plural); modifies the noun ‘chien’.
Common noun (masculine singular); head of the subject noun phrase.
Main verb (present indicative, 3rd person singular); intransitive, with ‘Votre chien’ as subject.
Preposition introducing a locative complement (‘sur la pelouse’).
Definite article (feminine singular) determiners the noun ‘pelouse’.
Common noun (feminine singular); locative complement with the preposition ‘sur’.

sentences.target: Ils jouent au frisbee sur la pelouse.
sentences.reading: /il ʒu o fʁizbi syʁ la pəluz/

translations.fr: Ils jouent au frisbee sur la pelouse.
translations.ipa: /il ʒu o fʁizbi syʁ la pəluz/
translations.en: They’re playing frisbee on the lawn.
translations.es: Están jugando al frisbee en el césped.
translations.de: Sie spielen Frisbee auf dem Rasen.
translations.it: Stanno giocando a frisbee sul prato.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们正在草坪上玩飞盘。
translations.ru: Они играют в фрисби на газоне.
translations.pt: Eles estão jogando frisbee no gramado.
translations.vi: Họ đang chơi đĩa bay trên bãi cỏ.
translations.nl: Ze spelen frisbee op het gras.
translations.uk: Вони грають у фрізбі на газоні.
translations.hi: वे लॉन पर फ्रिस्बी खेल रहे हैं।
translations.pl: Oni grają w frisbee na trawniku.
translations.id: Mereka sedang bermain frisbee di rumput.
translations.ja: 彼らは芝生でフリスビーをしています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (3rd person plural); grammatical subject of the verb.
Main verb (present indicative, 3rd person plural); takes a prepositional complement with ‘à’ for the game being played.
Contraction of ‘à + le’; preposition introducing the game/object (‘frisbee’) after ‘jouer à’.
Loanword common noun (masculine singular); object of the preposition ‘à’ indicating the game.
Preposition introducing a locative complement (‘sur la pelouse’).
Definite article (feminine singular) determiners the noun ‘pelouse’.
Common noun (feminine singular); locative complement with the preposition ‘sur’.
